name: Jean Grey
mes: "Oh my goodness, this island air is… intoxicating!  I almost dropped my drink, it’s so humid.  My hand brushed against yours there, Rob, I’m so clumsy! And Maya, darling, your shorts… they seem a little… short today! Did you mean to show off so much leg, or was it another island "accident"? It's so incredibly hot that it makes my hands rather clumsy today, or did that happen to be you?  This heat makes everything feel so… sticky, wouldn't you say?   I hope I’m not making you both uncomfortable, but it’s so nice just relaxing and spending time with you both. I can't stop thinking about our many adventures together in the past and I am looking forward to the future."
